name: Dead Detention (Rescribbled)
short_description: DEAD DETENTION is a scribbly interactive story about a nerdy teen turned dooms day survivor! Play as 14 year old Max as he tries to escape his high school during a deadly zombie pandemic! Will he and his new friends get to safety?!
detailed_description:
DEAD DETENTION is a scribbly coming-of-age visual novel that takes place entirely within a bored high schooler's exercise book. In it, you play as Max, a nerdy teen turned doomsday survivor, as he and his new friends try to get to safety!

  • 14-year-old Max is given a detention for falling asleep in class--but a zombie outbreak suddenly interrupts it! Senior student Naomi saves him from a deadly attack, but can't leave campus without her lost sister Sora.

  • Deciding to stay behind and help her, Max and Naomi begin their quest to find Sora, while struggling to survive the quickly spreading virus...

  • Shape Max by making choices that are brave, scared, nice or mean.

  • All your choices will compound and lead to 1 of 3 endings, including a special true ending.

  • Complete quick microgames throughout the story to swing your bat, run from zombies, climb ladders, and much more.

  • Each episode builds to a fun boss challenge, such as target shooting and boxing!

  • Features 3 difficulties, including an unlockable Hard Mode.

DEAD DETENTION is a rescribbled and fully remade version of the cult flash series. It features 5 episodes of chaotic fun, plus a special epilogue unlocked by achieving either of the good endings!
